subject: Add Inventory and Deployment Global property needed for Bulkpm
commit_message:
Add Inventory and Deployment Global property needed for Bulkpm

Change-Id: I9839bc2937446f4062ae922f7d287b1150a1b224
Issue-ID: INT-1375
Signed-off-by: rajendrajaiswal <rajendra.jaiswal@ericsson.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange 2: Chained-CI build started, max time: 10800 seconds

Patch Set 1:

Is it correct that GLOBAL_INVENTORY_SERVER_PROTOCOL is exposing "https" on port "8080" (lines 216 and 217)

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange 2: Chained-CI build finished with status OK
Full results can be seen here: https://orange-opensource.gitlab.io/lfn/onap/xtesting-onap-view/results//98894-1/index.html

Patch Set 2:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 2:

Gitlab Orange 2: Chained-CI build started, max time: 10800 seconds
Change has been successfully merged by Daniel Rose

Patch Set 2:
